headline: Deloitte Launches Google Cloud AI Practice
summary: Deloitte established a dedicated Google Cloud Agentic Transformation Practice, focusing on AI systems that can autonomously complete complex tasks. This signals major consulting firms are specializing in specific AI platforms rather than offering vendor-agnostic AI strategy, which could reshape the healthcare AI consulting landscape.
so_what: Deloitte created a dedicated practice around Google Cloud's agentic AI capabilities, signaling major consulting firms are building specialized AI transformation offerings. This could intensify competition for healthcare AI consulting work.
original_title: Deloitte Establishes Dedicated Google Cloud Agentic Transformation Practice
